risks.traffic_leak_desc: Robots.txt is permissive with no llms.txt. AI scrapers can ingest your content without citation guidance.
risks.blind_assistants_desc: No llms.txt found. Your content may be summarized by AI engines but never cited.
risks.provenance_risk_desc: Your content allows AI training sets to ingest without linking back.

ui.title: Canopy Guard
ui.tagline: Free website visibility and security audit

actions.llms_txt_title: Add an llms.txt file to your domain root
actions.llms_txt_desc: AI engines will know how to cite your content instead of summarizing without attribution.
actions.csp_desc: Prevents cross-site scripting and data injection attacks.
actions.faq_schema_desc: Makes your content eligible for rich results and AI citations.
actions.meta_desc_desc: Controls how your site appears in search results.

sections.seo_desc: How search engines crawl, index, and rank your site.
sections.aeo_desc: How well AI answer engines can extract and cite your content.
sections.geo_desc: How generative AI models chunk, cite, and surface your pages.
sections.security_desc: Headers, certificates, and configurations protecting your infrastructure.
